ComponentDescription: ROS2 camera_node stack — publishes /camera/image_raw for detr_node

Run.Script: docker run --rm --name robops-ros2stack --network host -e ROBOT_ID={configuration:/robotId} -e DATASET_VERSION=PLACEHOLDER_DATASET_VERSION -e MONGO_URI={secrets:robops/mongo_uri} -e RMW_IMPLEMENTATION=rmw_cyclonedds_cpp 688567275774.dkr.ecr.eu-central-1.amazonaws.com/robops/ros2-stack:PLACEHOLDER_DATASET_VERSION
